title: Replace Your GitHub Actions YAML with CUE

resources.title: CUE Documentation
resources.evidence_quote: First place you'll wanna go to is queue.dev/docs.

resources.title: CUE Central Registry
resources.evidence_quote: This is the relatively new effort from the Q team to make it easier to adopt Q for common workflows.

resources.title: GitHub Actions package on CUE Registry
resources.evidence_quote: If we search for GitHub actions and click on the package, you'll see that we now have a bunch of definitions that we can import from the central registry
